title: Hellay's Xp Containers
description: Adds a way to store your xp!
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/689c8cc808fdee84705adc81cbcaf7a5a997327b.png)
# **About**
**This pack adds three items: Xp scroll, Xp bottle and Xp jar. You can use the Xp bottle and the Xp jar to store your Xp. And you can craft these items with Xp scrolls**

**You can find all of these items in ancient cities and trial chamber vaults**
## **FAQ**
-  ### **What versions does it support?**
   **it supports 1.20.4 and 1.21**
-  ### **Does it require any additional mods**
   **Yes , just Fabric API**
-  ### **Where can I report any issues that I have?**
   **You can report bugs and issues in the github page or in my discord server**
-  ### **Can I modify this mod?**
   **Yes , if it's for personal use feel free to change anything you want.But if you want to publish the modified mod or put my mod in a modpack or showcase it in a video please mention my name , put a link to my pack or get permission from me in my discord**
